menzaApp.name: Menza App - Walking Tracker Mobile App
menzaApp.description: A React Native mobile application for real-time location tracking and route visualization. Built with Expo, Expo Maps, Supabase, and Zustand for cloud-based data management and state handling.

reactChatApp.name: Real-Time Chat Application
reactChatApp.description: A real-time one-to-one messaging application built with React, Socket.IO, Express, MongoDB, JWT, and Tailwind CSS. Features WebSocket-based instant communication and secure authentication.

airCompanion.name: Airport Companion Mobile App
airCompanion.description: A React Native mobile application featuring indoor navigation system and AI-powered chatbot integration. Built with Redux, Firebase, and YOLOv5 for enhanced airport experience.
